title: Disco Lights, SEBRUANC Mini Disco Ball LED Party Lamp Music Controlled Disco DJ 360° Rotating Ball Lights 3W RGB Stage Lights with Remote Control for Home Parties Birthday KTV Party Christmas 1pc
features: Mode: You can set the desired mode (music control mode, remote control mode, automatic mode) and light brightness. Then press "+" or "-" to adjust the speed of light movement.
Energy saving: LED life is more than 20,000 hours. It can cover an area of approximately 15 m². Thanks to modern LED technology, this lamp is also very energy-efficient.
Remote Control: Equipped with remote control, it is convenient to adjust the flashing pace according to the theme of party and atmosphere.

Small and Portable: Easy to install and use, plug and play. This stage light is safe and stable, small and easy to carry. The LED magic ball can also be a perfect gift for children. Suitable for family party, birthday party, dance party, DJ bar, camping, Christmas and other party scenes.
Product Includes: 1 x Disco Light 1 x Remote Control 1 x Shelf 2 x Screws 1 x User Manual

【Product + High Quality Service】: Please contact us if you have any quality problems after receiving the product or during use. We replace it for free, the cost is paid by the seller, no need to worry, we hope to offer you the best quality products and services.
